benchmarks.title: Breaking the Diffraction-Encoding Limit for High-Capacity Meta-Holography via Multiorder Decoupling
benchmarks.claim: Multiorder decoupling breaks the diffraction-encoding limit for meta-holography, enabling higher information density per unit aperture than single-order designs

benchmarks.title: Dynamic Vectorial Holographic Display With Electrically Reconfigurable LC-Integrated Metasurface
benchmarks.claim: Electrically reconfigurable LC-metasurface hybrid achieves multi-channel dynamic vectorial holography; static metasurfaces lack post-fabrication tunability

benchmarks.title: Nonlinear virtual lens for programmable and multispectral infrared upconversion imaging
benchmarks.claim: Nonlinear flat optics platform enables tunable-bandwidth IR-to-visible upconversion imaging without cryogenic detectors

benchmarks.title: Multilevel Stochastic Plug-and-Play for Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
benchmarks.metric: convergence speed / PSNR on sparse-view CT
benchmarks.claim: Multilevel stochastic PnP converges faster than standard stochastic PnP while maintaining reconstruction quality on SVCT

benchmarks.title: Quantum CT via Dynamic Interval Encoding and Prior-Balanced QUBO Reconstruction
benchmarks.metric: QUBO variable budget / grayscale quantization error
benchmarks.claim: Dynamic interval encoding reduces QUBO size and quantization error vs fixed global bit-plane encoding for quantum CT

benchmarks.title: High-fidelity lensless polarization imaging enabled by differentiable mask optimization and second-order regularized reconstruction
benchmarks.claim: Differentiable mask optimization combined with second-order regularization improves high-fidelity lensless polarization imaging

benchmarks.title: Guided progressive reconstructive imaging for low-dose analytical ptychography
benchmarks.claim: Quantization-based guided progressive framework enables low-dose, high-throughput real-time analytical ptychography

benchmarks.title: VSANet: View-aware Sparse Attention Network for Light Field Image Denoising
benchmarks.claim: Locality-sensitive hashing sparse attention achieves global cross-view aggregation with linear complexity for LF denoising
